big_case.notes: State petitioner, certified damages class, CFR signal, and a systemic QI/Eighth Amendment question gave it above-median stakes, but fact-bound QPs, an unpublished memorandum below, no split, and a quiet Rule 46 settlement dismissal (no discernible reaction) cap it well below landmark.
